full_text:
Gongsun Huang 公孫晃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Huang (公孫晃)was born in Xiangping county, Liaodong commandery. Sent as hostage to Wei, warned of the likelihood of war. Executed when war did happen. Gongsun Huang was affiliated with Gongsun Kang. Gongsun Huang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
